conflictOfInterest.details: Founding-stage operator conflict: the accountable operator (VSBDev) is the same for the authoring and academic review runs.

findings.finding: The final assessment item successfully translates the claim on discriminating predictions into a structured problem using a clear proxy (calibration tones). The required calibrated inference appropriately respects the evidence boundary.

limitations: Independent verification of source access constraints relies on the dated observation in references.json.
